name: Rapid7, Inc.
business: Rapid7 is a global cybersecurity operations software and service provider. It sells solutions including managed detection and response (MDR), next-gen SIEM, exposure management, and vulnerability management. As of December 31, 2025, it had more than 11,500 customers in 150 countries, spanning industries such as technology, financial services, healthcare, manufacturing, and government.
sellsTo: industries: technology, energy, financial services, healthcare and life sciences, manufacturing, media and entertainment, retail, education, real estate, transportation, government, professional services

exposures.sentence: Rapid7's comprehensive security solutions, including our market-leading managed detection and response ("MDR") services, next-gen security information and event management ("SIEM"), and exposure management help our global customers unify exposure management with threat detection and response to prioritize and reduce material risk, and eliminate threats with greater speed, precision, and consistency.

Our integrated, AI-driven platform replaces reactive security with a preemptive, risk-aware approach that reduces attack surfaces and enables faster, more confident response through contextually rich insights and deep operational visibility.

catalysts.event: Opened a new Global Capability Center in Pune, India
catalysts.sentence: For example, in April 2025, we opened a new Global Capability Center in Pune, India, to serve as an innovation hub and SOC.

catalysts.event: Entered into a cloud-services agreement with minimum spend commitments
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we entered into a cloud-services agreement with a cloud services provider that contains minimum spend commitments. The agreement provides for an annual commitment of $125.0 million per year over the next five years, with an additional $35.0 million obligation over the five-year period of the agreement, for an aggregate total commitment of $660.0 million.
